interfaces.name: getHomeOverview
interfaces.description: Get overview data for the home page including hero content, featured categories, services, and products.

interfaces.name: getMainProductCategories
interfaces.description: Get active top-level product categories for navigation and listing pages.

interfaces.name: getServicesOverview
interfaces.description: Get list of main services with overview information for the Services page and home navigation tiles.

interfaces.name: searchProducts
interfaces.description: Search products by text query with optional filters and sorting (used by global search and filtered results).

interfaces.name: listProductsByCategory
interfaces.description: List products for a given category with filters and sorting (used for category-based browsing like tubing, beams, cabinets).

interfaces.name: getProductFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter options for a given product category or for all products if no category is specified.

interfaces.name: getProductDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a single product including specifications, pricing, and datasheet link if available.

interfaces.name: addProductToCart
interfaces.description: Add a simple (non-configured) product to the current cart. Creates a cart if none exists.

interfaces.name: getCartDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details of the current shopping cart including items and totals.

interfaces.name: updateCartItemQuantity
interfaces.description: Update the quantity of a specific item in the current cart and recalculate totals.

interfaces.name: removeCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove a specific item from the current cart.

interfaces.name: clearCart
interfaces.description: Remove all items from the current cart.

interfaces.name: startCheckout
interfaces.description: Start or resume a checkout session for the current cart.

interfaces.name: setCheckoutShippingAddress
interfaces.description: Set or update the shipping address for the current checkout session.

interfaces.name: getAvailableShippingMethodsForCheckout
interfaces.description: Get available shipping methods for the current checkout session and cart.

interfaces.name: selectCheckoutShippingMethod
interfaces.description: Select a shipping method for the current checkout session and update shipping cost and estimates.

interfaces.name: getCheckoutSummary
interfaces.description: Get a full summary of the current checkout including cart items, shipping address, selected shipping method, and totals.

interfaces.name: getServiceDetails
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for a specific service such as laser cutting or emergency repair.

interfaces.name: getLaserCuttingOptions
interfaces.description: Get option metadata for the laser cutting quote form such as supported materials, units, and tolerance types.

interfaces.name: submitLaserCuttingQuoteRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a laser cutting/custom cutting quote request with material, dimensions, tolerance, quantity, shipping, and contact details.

interfaces.name: getEmergencyRepairOptions
interfaces.description: Get option metadata for emergency repair requests including regions and priorities.

interfaces.name: submitEmergencyRepairRequest
interfaces.description: Submit an emergency repair/on-site repair service request including region, priority, issue details, site address, and contact information.

interfaces.name: getCabinetBaseProducts
interfaces.description: Get base cabinet products that can be configured in the cabinet configurator.

interfaces.name: getCabinetConfigurationOptions
interfaces.description: Get allowed ranges and options for configuring a cabinet based on a base product.

interfaces.name: previewCabinetConfiguration
interfaces.description: Calculate price and validate a cabinet configuration without adding it to the cart.

interfaces.name: createConfiguredCabinetAndAddToCart
interfaces.description: Create a configured cabinet product instance based on user selections and add it to the cart in a single operation.

interfaces.name: getAboutPageContent
interfaces.description: Get structured content for the About Us page including history, mission, certifications, and key stats.

interfaces.name: getFacilitiesPageContent
interfaces.description: Get structured content for the Our Facilities page describing factory layout, machinery, and safety standards.

interfaces.name: getFactoryToursInfo
interfaces.description: Get information for the Factory Tours page including tour types, safety requirements, and schedule.

interfaces.name: submitFactoryTourRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a factory tour booking request with preferred date/time, group size, and contact details.

interfaces.name: getWishlists
interfaces.description: Get all wishlists for the current user, including the default wishlist and any named project lists.

interfaces.name: createWishlist
interfaces.description: Create a new wishlist or project list.

interfaces.name: getWishlistItems
interfaces.description: Get items contained in a specific wishlist.

interfaces.name: addProductToWishlist
interfaces.description: Save a product to a wishlist, creating the wishlist if needed when a new list name is provided.

interfaces.name: removeWishlistItem
interfaces.description: Remove an item from a wishlist.

interfaces.name: moveWishlistItemToCart
interfaces.description: Move a product from a wishlist into the cart with a given quantity.

interfaces.name: getShippingPolicies
interfaces.description: Get structured shipping policy information including typical delivery windows and free shipping conditions.

interfaces.name: getPolicyDocuments
interfaces.description: Get policy documents such as returns, warranty, terms of use, and privacy.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load the current cart from storage or create a new one if none exists.

helperFunctions.name: _recalculateCartTotals
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to recompute cart subtotal, shipping_total, tax_total, and total after cart changes.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCheckoutSession
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get or initialize the checkout session for the current cart.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateConfiguredCabinetPrice
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to compute pricing for a configured cabinet based on base product and configuration options.

helperFunctions.name: _getDefaultWishlist
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get or create the default wishlist for the current user.
